name: pc-gameframework
author: SashaRX
description: PlayCanvas Game Framework - KTX2 streaming, meshopt, materials, cubemaps, postfx

scripts.build:esm: tsc --project tsconfig.esm.json && node scripts/build-worker-inline.mjs && npm run rename-to-mjs
scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('build')) fs.rmSync('build', {recursive: true}); console.log('✅ Cleaned build/')" && npm run build:esm
scripts.build-push: npm run build:esm && npm run push
scripts.build-push:clean: npm run build:clean && npm run push
